svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 25px; margin-left: 354px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1f2937;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1f2937, #c4ccd8); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
Oversight Ladder — strict downward-visibility
(each tier sees what the tier below sees, and more)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 62px; margin-left: 354px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #6b7280;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#6b7280, #868c98); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Authorization is role-based — gated on profiles.role via auth_is_admin() / auth_is_leader_of() / coverage helpers. No hardcoded UUIDs or emails.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 250, 252), rgb(21, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 340px; margin-left: 161px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #94a3b8;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#94a3b8, #576476); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: visibility flows downward ▼ (higher tiers inherit everything below)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(247, 230, 221), rgb(48, 34, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 92, 56), rgb(208, 129, 98));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 160px; margin-left: 155px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #7a3a22;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#7a3a22, #dea792); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Super Admin (Tom)
super_admin
Sees the entire ladder below — plus the audit trail,
platform config, invites & danger-zone snapshots
(SUPER_ADMIN_ONLY — invisible to the Ministry Admin)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(230, 239, 230), rgb(29, 36, 29)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(90, 125, 90), rgb(117, 147, 117));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 295px; margin-left: 155px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #2f4a2f;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#2f4a2f, #a4bba4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Ministry Admin (Julian)
ministry_admin
Reads everything an Over-Shepherd and Leader can —
auth_is_admin() = role in (super_admin, ministry_admin)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(221, 232, 242), rgb(32, 41, 50)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 110, 165), rgb(111, 154, 202));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 425px; margin-left: 155px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e3a5f;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e3a5f, #a9c1e1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Over-Shepherd
over_shepherd
Reads the Leaders & people in their coverage —
over_shepherd_covered_profile_ids() / own active assignments

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 237, 214), rgb(40, 33, 13)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 134, 11), rgb(162, 119, 13));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 560px; margin-left: 155px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #6b5009;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#6b5009, #bea76a); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Leader / Co-Leader
leader
Reads only their active group assignments —
auth_is_leader_of(group_id). Live by default (ADR 0024);
check-ins stay behind their own gate.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 240, 240), rgb(31, 31, 31)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(156, 163, 175), rgb(92, 98, 108));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 668px; margin-left: 155px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #6b7280;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#6b7280, #868c98); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: member — NOT an app-login role (non-auth records only)

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #3f2d5c;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#3f2d5c, #c9bae2); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
EXCEPTION ① — Ministry Admin's Private Care Note
shepherd_care_private_notes / _key_slots
Readable ONLY by the Ministry Admin who created it
(auth_role() = 'ministry_admin' AND created_by = self).
Client-side AES-256-GCM, zero-knowledge — server never holds plaintext.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 288px; margin-left: 564px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #6a4c93; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#6a4c93, #b298d5); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 150px; margin-left: 739px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #b91c1c; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#b91c1c, #ff9c9c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); white-space: nowrap;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#7a4806, #d0a56c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
EXCEPTION ② — Author-private Care Notes & Prayer Requests
care_notes / prayer_requests
Sealed to their author by default. The ladder peeks ONLY when
the per-subject transparency grant is ON — and the Super Admin
is gated on the SAME grant as the Ministry Admin (no broader bypass).
The toggle table note_transparency_grants is itself admin-only.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 546px; margin-left: 564px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #c2730a; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#c2730a, #be7a1f); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ladder peeks only on active grant

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 738px; margin-left: 116px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #6b7280;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#6b7280, #868c98); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
Predicates: auth_is_admin() · auth_role()='super_admin' · auth_is_leader_of(group_id) · over_shepherd coverage · auth_profile_id() (self / author / creator)
Self-service exception: a pending invitee sets their OWN profile name via account.set_own_full_name — only while full_name_pending (ADR 0025).
Source of truth: docs/architecture/RLS_VISIBILITY.md · README role model · ADRs 0002 / 0003 / 0017 / 0020 / 0024 / 0025
